description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding on back neck, graphic print on the front and contrast colour stitch cover tape inside back neckFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanWarm ironThis puma “Rocksteady and Ska” T-shirt is just perfect for music lovers – you'll make a bold statement with this bright red t-shirt!  Wear it with puma jeans and hightop Basketball shoes to demonstrate that Sports Brands have the best style when it comes to casual dressing.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
